title: Review uncaptured payments
excerpt: Learn how to use reviews if your Stripe integration uses auth and capture. By default, you [create payments](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/accept-a-payment.md) in one step. You don’t need to do anything else to send funds to your bank account. Stripe also supports two-step payments, often called [auth and capture](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/place-a-hold-on-a-payment-method.md). If your integration uses this method, approving a review and capturing a payment are separate actions.…
